channel.title: World - Latest - Google News
channel.copyright: Copyright © 2026 Google. All rights reserved. This XML feed is made available solely for the purpose of rendering Google News results within a personal feed reader for personal, non-commercial use. Any other use of the feed is expressly prohibited. By accessing this feed or using these results in any manner whatsoever, you agree to be bound by the foregoing restrictions.

item.title: Justice Department settles lawsuit brought by Trump-Russia probe subject Carter Page - NBC News
item.description:
1. Justice Department settles lawsuit brought by Trump-Russia probe subject Carter Page  NBC News
  2. Trump admin agrees to pay $1.25M to 2016 Trump adviser over surveillance  Politico
  3. Trump administration reaches $1.25 million settlement with ex-Trump campaign adviser Carter Page  CBS News
  4. Trump administration settles lawsuit with ex-Trump adviser Carter Page  CNN
  5. Former Trump adviser Carter Page latest to get lucrative Justice Department payout  MS NOW

item.title: Indonesia suggests charging a toll to transit the Malacca Strait - The Economist
item.description:
1. Indonesia suggests charging a toll to transit the Malacca Strait  The Economist
  2. The Iran war is pushing Southeast Asia to debate the once unthinkable: Whether ships will need to pay to transit the Strait of Malacca  Yahoo
  3. Hormuz crisis throws spotlight on world's largest 'chokepoint' - the Malacca Strait  Reuters
  4. Indonesia Floats Ship Tax in Malacca Strait as Singapore Defends Free Passage  Jakarta Globe
  5. Indonesia Rules Out Levies for Malacca Strait Ship Transits  Bloomberg.com

item.title: "One Dies, Get Another": 13 American History Facts Left Out Of Your Textbooks - BuzzFeed
item.description: "One Dies, Get Another": 13 American History Facts Left Out Of Your Textbooks  BuzzFeed

item.title: China Drilled Through 3,413 Meters of Antarctic Ice and Opened a Gateway to a Lake Frozen in Time - The Daily Galaxy
item.description: China Drilled Through 3,413 Meters of Antarctic Ice and Opened a Gateway to a Lake Frozen in Time  The Daily Galaxy

item.title: Israel is raping Palestinians with dogs - owenjones.news
item.description:
1. Israel is raping Palestinians with dogs  owenjones.news
  2. How researchers are building an airtight case on Israeli sexual torture of Palestinian detainees  TRT World
  3. “Torture and Sexual Violence with Dogs”: New Report Alleges Inhuman Abuse in Depraved Israeli Detention Centres  Greatreporter
  4. Sde Teiman Torture Camp Allegedly Involves Dog-Related Sexual Abuse of Palestinian Captives, Activist Claims  International Business Times UK
  5. Israeli Guards Admit Dogs Are Used to Rape Palestinians, Says Analyst  Novara Media
